data.content: Implemented zero-count overview column persistence on branch codex/119c-overview-hide-empty at commit 5761392ea2376a7799f21d5e15bbe85c954e042d. The overview now remembers introduced columns per tab, keeps them rendered when empty, shows an empty-column Hide button, removes the column when Hide is clicked, and reintroduces it automatically when beats return. Verification on updated origin/main: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
